upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pataNge pravasati' (va॰bf॰saM॰27.2) sUrye gaganAdapakAmati astaM gacCati sati
'varzagaRaM provAsa' (CAM॰u॰4.4.5) varzapUgaM deSAntare vasatiM cakAretyarTaH
'amA vE no'dya vasurvasati yo naH prAvAtsIt' (Sa॰brA॰1.6.4.3) apAkramIt apAgAdityAha
parimalaH pavanAnusArI diSi digi prAvAtsIt vistftimagamadityarTaH
'viDAya vfttiM BAryAyAH pravaset kAryavAnnaraH' (manu॰9.74) videSaM viprakfzwaM deSaM gacCedityAha
'na me vEraM pravasatyekAhamapi' (hari॰2.50.84) pravasati viSrAmyati viramatItyAhopacAreRa
'nirvAsayelliNgaM vA savfzaRaM parivAsya' (bO॰Da॰2.1.14) parivAsya=CittvA
pravAsanaM parAsanaM nizUdanaM nihiMsanam ityamaraH
'pravAsayed daRqayitvA brAhmaRaM tu vivAsayet' (manu॰8.123) pravAsayenmArayet arTaSAstre pravAsaSabdasya mAraRe prayogAd iti yAjYa॰2.81 ityatra mitAkzarAyAm
'tataH pravAsito vidvAn vidureRa narastadA (BA॰Adi॰141.5) pravAsitaH prezitaH
'muzitaM pravAsitaM cEzAmanirgataM rAtrO grAmasvAmI dadyAt' (kO॰a॰4.90) pravAsitam=anyatra nItaM (Danam)
'yo vE gfheByaH pravasan priyARAM nAnusaMsmaret' (BA॰vi॰4.47) pravasan-prayAn
'asmin (narake) nivAso'sulaBapravAsaH' (avadA॰SrezWi॰5) pravAso deSAntaragamanam..
'atyantanidropagamAya muktA (SilA) nidrApravAsAya kaperbaBUva (avada॰jA॰24.21) nidrApravAsAyeti nidrApagamAyetyAha
'pravAsAdupAvfttena kASyapena' (SA॰) pravasatyasminniti pravAso deSAntaram praSabdo viprarze
'pUrvavad virAwakramErupasTAyASitvA pravasaTamezyan' (Apa॰SrO॰6.7.24.5) pravasaTaH pravAsaH sA ha vAguccakrAma
'saMvatsaraM prozya' (CAM॰u॰5.1.8) prozya=dUra uzitvA
'nAcAryasyAnapAkftya pravAsaM prAjYaH kurvIta' (BA0 u0 4415) pravAsa ASramAntare sTitiH
'dvAdaSarAtraM parivasatyuKAvadaBriM biBrat' (kA SrO0 22121) parivasati tizWati kAlaM kzapayati
'jApinAM hominAM cEva DyAyinAM tIrTavAsinAm na parivasanti pApAni…' (va0 Darma0 2612).. na parivasanti na ciraM tizWanti
'pUrvedyuragniM praRayedityekaM parokzAntAM parivasedityaparam' (BA0 SrO0 745) parivaset pari samApayet
'astamite'pAM pUrRaM (karta) parivAsayet' (ASva0 gf0 286) parivAsayet odayAttatra vaset tizWet
'acCinno rAyaH suvIra ityagraM parivAsayati' (Apa0 SrO0 71210) parivAsayati Cinatti
'taM parivAsayati' (Sa0 brA0 36417) ukto'rTaH
'BartA rAjakule kAryavaSAtparyu zitaH' (paYcata0) tatra niSAM sTitaH
'yAtayAmaM gatarasaM pUti paryuzitaM ca yat' ( gItA0 1710) paryuzitaM rAtryantaritam kftarAtriparivAsam
'AryaH paryuzitaM tu nAByavaharatyanDaH kzuDAnDopyasO' (vi0 guRA0 101) ukto'rTaH
'na ca paryuzitaM vAkyaM svErezvapi kadAcana' (nEzaDo vakti) (BA0 vana0 7313) paryuzitaM pratijYAtakAlAtilaNGi
'aparyuzitapratijYeca mArutO pranazwe kOravarAje' (veRI0 6) paryuzitA rAtryantaritA ahaH-parivAsaviDura-pratiSrave ityarTaH
'aparyuzitapApAste nadIH sapta pibanti ye' (BA0 Adi0 17021) aparyuzitapApA niHSezitapApAH
'tayoranyataraH parivAsitaH' (satyA0 SrO0 2426) parivAsitaH CinnAgraH
'SulvAtprAdeSe parivAsya vedaparivAsanAni nidaDAti' (Apa0 SrO0 1265) parivAsya CittvA parivAsanAni vedAgrARi vedo darBamuzwiH
'iha tayA saha paryuzitam' (svapna0 1) paryuzitamuzitam anarTakaH pariH
'liNgaM vA savfzaRaM parivAsyAYjalAvADAya' (bO0 Da0 21114) parivAsya CittvA
'na nAgaloke na svarge na vimAne trivizwape parivAsaH suKastAdfka rasAtalatale yaTA' (BA0 u0 10215) parivAso nivAsaH
'gavAM ca parivAsena BUmiH SuDyati…' (manu0 5124) parivAso'horAtranivAsaH kAlaparivAsaH kAlAtyayaH
'aTavA tadaNgaparivAsaSItalaM mayi kiYcidarpaya' (mAlatI0 942) parivAsaH sOraBam
